intended_use: Second Opinion® Pediatric is a computer aided detection ("CADe") software to aid in the detection of caries in bitewing and periapical radiographs. The intended patient population of the device is pat
intended_use_full: Second Opinion® Pediatric is a computer aided detection ("CADe") software to aid in the detection of caries in bitewing and periapical radiographs. The intended patient population of the device is patients aged 4 years and older that have primary or permanent teeth (primary or mixed dentition) and are indicated for dental radiographs.
ground_truth: Ground Truth reference standard for caries lesion identification
other_metrics: FPPI (False Positives Per Image): 1.22 (95% CI: 1.14, 1.30); wAFROC FOM: 0.86 (95% CI: 0.84, 0.88); HR-ROC FOM: 0.94 (95% CI: 0.93, 0.96); LS mean Dice Score (segmentation accuracy): 0.76 (95% CI: 0.75, 0.77)
